description: A plain candid arrest/custody photograph (no graphic overlay or on-image text other than the lettering printed on the officer's jacket). Indoors against a tan/beige wall, a federal officer stands with his back to the camera wearing a dark navy windbreaker with large white block lettering 'POLICE' over 'HSI' (Homeland Security Investigations) across the back; he is bald. Facing the camera at right stands a detained man with short dark hair, wearing a blue zip-up hooded sweatshirt with sherpa lining over a bright blue t-shirt, hands held in front (apparently restrained), with a neutral/resigned expression. A folder of papers sits on a surface at lower left. This documents the arrest referenced in the tweet (Tranquilino Sixto-Anorve). It is a candid law-enforcement photo, not a designed meme or poster.
